channel.title: CaseBriefKit
channel.description: Free case brief template and maker updates for law school study notes.

item.title: CaseBriefKit
item.description: Free case brief template and maker for law school reading notes.

item.title: Case Brief Maker
item.description: Generate FIRAC, IRAC, and CREAC case briefs in the browser.

item.title: Law School Case Brief Template
item.description: Free law school case brief template with maker, PDF, DOCX, outline, and examples.

item.title: Free Case Brief Template
item.description: Copy or download a free case brief template for law school.

item.title: Case Brief Template PDF
item.description: Download a free printable case brief template PDF.

item.title: Case Brief Template DOCX
item.description: Download a free editable DOCX case brief template.

item.title: Case Brief Format
item.description: Compare common case brief formats for class notes.

item.title: IRAC Case Brief Example
item.description: Review a short IRAC case brief example for law school notes.

item.title: Sponsor Brief
item.description: One-page sponsor pilot brief for relevant law student study resources.

item.title: Sponsor Media Kit
item.description: Sponsor placement information for relevant legal education resources.

item.title: Advertise on CaseBriefKit
item.description: Pilot sponsor placement details for law school study resources.
